About Lumina

We help businesses make smarter decisions and grow with clarity.

Many founders move fast but struggle with unclear positioning, weak validation, scattered data, and inconsistent execution. Lumina Growth brings strategy, product thinking, brand clarity, and growth systems into one integrated partnership.

See Our Approach

Solutions

Integrated growth solutions for every stage of business.

View Programs

Business Strategy

Market validation, business model design, positioning, and go-to-market planning.

Product Strategy

UX research, MVP planning, feature prioritization, and product roadmap creation.

Growth & Marketing

Funnel optimization, acquisition strategy, retention planning, and growth experiments.

Data & Analytics

KPI framework, dashboard systems, performance tracking, and decision insights.

Brand Experience

Brand positioning, visual identity, messaging, and customer experience alignment.

How We Work

A focused process designed to turn uncertainty into progress.

01 / 05
Programs

Flexible programs for every growth stage.

Choose a focused program based on where your business is right now.

Launch Program

For founders validating ideas and building their first MVP.

  • Idea validation
  • Market research
  • MVP roadmap
  • Brand foundation
Start Launch

Growth Sprint

For businesses that need faster performance improvement.

  • Growth audit
  • Funnel optimization
  • Conversion strategy
  • Experiment roadmap
Start Sprint

Scale Program

For companies ready to expand product, team, and operations.

  • Product optimization
  • KPI dashboard
  • Growth system
  • Strategic expansion plan
Start Scale
Case Studies

Real growth stories from ambitious teams.

Helping a SaaS startup validate product-market fit

Orbit Studio - reworked onboarding and pricing signals before their Series A.

+42% activation

Repositioning a D2C brand for stronger conversion

Brightpath - clarified brand voice and simplified the purchase path.

+31% conversion

Building a KPI dashboard for a scaling business

Scalehub - unified scattered spreadsheets into one decision system.

3x faster decisions
Testimonial
They helped us move from scattered ideas to a clear growth roadmap with measurable execution.
